{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Icons
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Heralds]] can still hear [[Icons]] even if it is difficult to hear subtler powers.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Some powerful spirits use [[Icons]] as a form of introduction.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
